name: python3-async-timeout
title: python3-async-timeout
summary: timeout context manager for asyncio programs in Python
description:
timeout context manager for asyncio programs in Python
The context manager is useful in cases when you want to apply timeout
logic around block of code or in cases when asyncio.wait_for() is
not suitable. Also it's much faster than asyncio.wait_for()
because timeout doesn't create a new task.
.
Example:
.
with timeout(1.5):
yield from inner()
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-async-timeout because timeout context manager for asyncio programs in Python.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-async-timeout as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-async-timeout with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-async-timeout --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
